title: MR.SIGA Long Handled Dustpan and Brush Set, Upright Broom and Dustpan Set with Adjustable Handle, Tall Sweeping Brush with Comb Teeth for Floor Cleaning, Indoor, Outdoor, Home, Lobby, Grey
features: MR.SIGA broom and dustpan set is made of 4-layer dense bristles, durable plastic and long sturdy steel handles(broom handle 51.7 inches, dustpan handle 38 inches) which are adjustable. Great for cleaning office, garage, hardwood floors, tiles etc.

Enhanced 4-layer dense bristles with flare-tip design captures fine dust and pet hair effectively. Rubber lip lies flat against cleaning surface which allows for maximum pickup. When the broom head collects hair, just comb it out through the built in dustpan teeth.

51.7 inches of long broom handle provides a easy cleaning of hard to reach places so it saves your back and knee. You can adjust the pole length to accommodate different cleaning jobs. Foam wrapped handle top fits comfortably and perfectly in hand, which offers a comfortable pickup and hold while sweeping.
Large capacity dustpan locks in open position for easy emptying, broom snaps into dustpan handle for easy stand-up storage and move around the house.

MR.SIGA's mission: Make your housework easier, and make the world cleaner. If you’re not happy about the product, you're covered by a full refund. Please do not hesitate to contact us with any questions you may have, we are here for support and advice!
description: Product Description MR.SIGA Long Handled Dustpan and Brush Set Soft rubber edge The dustpan with flexible rubber seal perfectly adapts to the floor and efficiently picks up dust and dirt. Easy cleaning Integrated rubber comb teeth effortlessly remove hair and paper residue from the bristles - hygienically without hand contact. Space-saving storage With its foldable design featuring a locking mechanism, the set can be stored in a space-optimized manner - on the wall or in the corner. Comfortable handling Sturdy metal handle with EVA foam grip for durable quality and pleasant, slip-resistant use. Is the broom handle height adjustable? Yes, the handle is adjustable in height: 94 cm or 131 cm. The 3-part design allows flexible adjustment to different body heights. How effectively does the broom remove pet hair and fine dust? Thanks to the innovative flare-tip bristles with a four-layer, dense structure, the broom effortlessly captures even the finest particles. The integrated rubber lip ensures optimum contact with the floor and maximum dirt pick-up. Can I simply remove hair from the bristles? Yes. The integrated comb teeth on the dustpan make it quick and effortless to remove hair and dust from the bristles - especially handy for households with pets or heavy shedding. Is the set stable and durable? Yes! The MR.SIGA sweeping set is made of robust plastic and sturdy metal components with a high weight capacity. At the same time, the lightweight design makes it easy to handle - perfect for everyday use. Does the set take up a lot of space when I store it? No. Thanks to the upright stand function, the broom and dustpan can be stored neatly and in a space-saving manner. This keeps your cleaning utensils within easy reach without lying untidily in the corner.
